# Sprint: Pipeline Reliability and Bug-Fix Workflow Hardening

> Sprint ID: FORGE-S12
> Status: 🔵 active
> Execution Mode: sequential

## Goal

Every user-facing command path reaches a valid terminal state; every store write is verified; every record carries real timestamps and cost data.

## Description

Eliminate dead ends, enforce phase gates, ensure real timestamps and programmatic cost capture, and verify store writes across Forge workflows.
